mapper.sql: c.id AS cart_id, s.id AS sku_id, p.id AS product_id, p.title AS product_name, s.specs AS sku_spec, p.main_image AS product_image, s.price AS price, c.quantity AS quantity, s.stock AS stock, p.merchant_id AS merchant_id, m.merchant_name AS merchant_name, p.status AS product_status, p.audit_status AS product_audit_status
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, sku_id, quantity FROM cart WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, user_id, sku_id, quantity FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND sku_id = #{skuId} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT FROM cart c JOIN sku s ON c.sku_id = s.id JOIN product p ON s.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN merchant m ON p.merchant_id = m.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart (user_id, sku_id, quantity) VALUES (#{userId}, #{skuId}, #{quantity})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cart WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
